title: Glanding and Termination
description: Professional cable glanding and termination services for power and instrumentation cables in Hong Kong.
overview: DES provides expert cable glanding and termination services for both power and instrumentation cables. Our technicians ensure proper connections that meet industry standards and ensure long-term reliability.
scope: Power cable termination (high and low voltage)
benefits: Reduced risk of faults or failures
process: Prepare cable ends and install glands
